attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
    WNRTC.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
    ,WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
    ,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
    , NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
    ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
    FROM
    $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_CG WNRTC
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    WHERE
    WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV'
    AND EXISTS
    ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
       WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT   =   NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
       AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE
       AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I' 
      )
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_ACRL_OM Y WHERE  WNRTC.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY  = Y.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY )

SELECT
    WNRTC.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
    ,WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
    ,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
    , NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
    ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
    FROM
    $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_CG WNRTC
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    WHERE
    WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV'
    AND EXISTS
    ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
       WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT   =   NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
       AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE
       AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I' 
      )
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_ACRL_OM Y WHERE  WNRTC.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY  = Y.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY )

SELECT 
  WNCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD AS ACCOUNT_CLASS     ,
  COALESCE(WNCUR.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE, -999)  AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
  SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,    
  WNCR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,  
  WNCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS ACCTD_AMOUNT ,
  'I' ACTION_CODE,
  NULL  AS ADJUSTMENT_ID                 ,
  NULL  AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER             ,
  NULL  AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE     ,
  WNCR.AMOUNT          ,
     1 AS BATCH_ID,
  NULL  AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID      ,     
  NULL  AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID         ,  
  WNCUR.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID          , 
  NULL  AS COGS_PERCENT                  ,
  NULL  AS COMMENTS                      ,
  NULL  AS CONTEXT                       ,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
  1 AS CREATED_BY,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATION_DATE,
  -9999  AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID      ,
  NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG ,
  NULL  AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT               ,
  'INV' AS EXTRACT_TYPE         ,   
  WNCR.FISCAL_ID, 
  'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG         , 
  WNCR.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      ,
  current_timestamp(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
  WNCR.GL_DT           AS       GL_DATE        ,
  WNCR.GL_POSTED_DT      AS       GL_POSTED_DATE,      
  NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME AS GLOBAL_NAME,
  NULL  AS GROUPING_ID   ,      
  NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,
  WNCR.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE  ,
  NULL  AS INVOICE_PERCENT               ,
  NULL  AS INVOICING_RULE_ID             ,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
  1 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG            ,
  NULL  AS LINE_PERCENT                ,
  SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT  AS LINE_SEQ_ID,
  NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE       AS LINE_TYPE,  -- FOR IMMEDIATE IT IS NULL
  NULL  AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID      ,
  NULL  AS ORDER_HEADER_ID,
 -7777  AS ORDER_LINE_ID,    
 -9999  AS ORDER_NUMBER,
 WNCR.ORG_ID  AS ORG_ID,
 NULL  AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID      ,
 NULL  AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
 'Y'  AS QUOTA_FLAG , 
 NULL  AS REASON_CODE                   ,
 NULL  AS REBATE_AMOUNT                 ,
 NULL  AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID          ,
 CASE WHEN NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL  
   ELSE 999
 END AS REQUEST_ID,
 WNCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT AS RULE_START_DATE     ,      
 COALESCE(ESCT_INIT_VAR2.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0)   AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,
 COALESCE(ESP_XAAS.SALES_REP_ID,0) AS SALESREP_ID ,   
 NULL  AS  SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID     ,       
 NULL  AS  SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID     ,      
 NULL  AS  SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID     ,     
 WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE   ,
 SC_TV_XAAS.SPLIT_PCT AS SPLIT_PERCENT,          
 COALESCE(EST_INIT_VAR2.TERRITORY_ID,  0)  AS TERRITORY_ID , 
 CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
    END AS TRANSACTION_DATE ,
 'O' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE     ,
  WNCR.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
  WNCR.TRX_DATE    AS TRX_DATE,
  NULL AS TRX_NAME,
  WNCR.TRX_NUMBER     AS TRX_NUMBER, 
  WNCR.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE      AS TRX_TYPE,
 NULL AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
 NULL AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
 'INV' AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
 WNCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
 SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
 SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_REP_NUM AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 SC_TV_XAAS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 -999 AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT 
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_EXP_CG WNCR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON WNCR.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_CG WNCUR
  ON WNCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=WNCUR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_ACRL_CG WSCF
  ON WNCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = WSCF.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX ACRL
  ON WSCF.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=ACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
   ON CAST(WNCR.GL_DT AS DATE) BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE and NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
   INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_ACRL_SNAP_XAAS  SC_TV_XAAS
   ON SC_TV_XAAS.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT =  ACRL.SK_LINE_REF_NUM 
  /* AND (SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0 OR SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT<-1000000000)  */
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR 
   ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
   AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNCR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
   INNER JOIN ( SELECT  NAT.AR_TRX_KEY, NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT ,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
   FROM 	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT , ( SELECT     AR_TRX_KEY FROM  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_EXP_CG WNCR    GROUP BY 1 ) WNCR
   WHERE WNCR.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY    
   GROUP BY 1,2,3 )  NAT 
		ON WNCR.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY    
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON WNCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNCR.PRODUCT_KEY)
   
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCTT_XAAS
   ON SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
   AND NSCTT_XAAS.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ESP_XAAS                
    ON ESP_XAAS.SALES_REP_NUMBER=SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_REP_NUM             
    AND ESP_XAAS.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2                
    ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SC_TV_XAAS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
    AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT_INIT_VAR2
    ON ESCT_INIT_VAR2.NAME  = SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
    AND ESCT_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
  WHERE 1=1 
  AND WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'N'
  AND ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY<0

SELECT DISTINCT
ACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY                        
,WI.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD 
,ACRL.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,WI.BK_COMPANY_CD                 
,WI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY      
,ACRL.GL_DT                         
,ACRL.GL_POSTED_DT                  
,WI.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD        
,ACRL.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,WI.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
,ACRL.RU_DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT       
,ACRL.RU_CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT      
,ACRL.RU_DEBIT_TRXL_AMT             
,ACRL.RU_CREDIT_TRXL_AMT            
,ACRL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT        
,ACRL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
,ACRL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT      
,ACRL.SS_CD                         
,ACRL.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY            
,ACRL.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY 
  FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX ACRL   INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_EXP_CG WI
    ON (WI.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=ACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY) 
    WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_TRX_CG NCR 
    WHERE NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY=ACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY)

SELECT 
   WNICE.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY 
   ,WNICE.AR_TRX_KEY
   ,WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,WNICE.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE          
   ,WNICE.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  
   ,WNICE.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT 
   ,WNICE.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
   ,WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  
   ,WNICE.GL_DT
   ,WNICE.SS_CODE
   ,WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY  
   ,COALESCE(WNIVI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
   ,WNICE.AMOUNT 
   ,(CASE WHEN WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END) *  WNICE.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS ACCTD_AMOUNT
   ,WNICE.FISCAL_ID
   ,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
   ,WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   ,WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
   ,WNICE.GL_POSTED_DT
   ,WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
   ,WNICE.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD
   ,COALESCE(NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,WNICE.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE) AS BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
   ,COALESCE(NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,WNICE.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT) AS SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
   ,WNICE.DV_PRODUCT_KEY 
   ,WNICE.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_EXP_CG WNICE
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON WNICE.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
   ON WNICE.BK_COMPANY_CD= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
   AND WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_VAL_CG  WNIVI
   ON WNICE.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = WNIVI.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
   ON NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY=WNIVI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
   AND NGLA.SS_CODE ='CG'
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
   ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
   AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE  = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
   AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNICE.TRX_DATE
   AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate'   
   /*WHERE( WNICE.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME LIKE '%VARIABLE%' OR UPPER(WNICE.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME) = 'DAILY RATES' ) :  HERE IMMEDIATE SHOULD BE QUALIFIED*/

SELECT 
  WNCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD AS ACCOUNT_CLASS     ,
  COALESCE(WNCUR.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE, -999)  AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
  SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,    
  WNCR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,  
  WNCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS ACCTD_AMOUNT ,
  'I' ACTION_CODE,
  NULL  AS ADJUSTMENT_ID                 ,
  NULL  AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER             ,
  NULL  AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE     ,
  WNCR.AMOUNT          ,
     1 AS BATCH_ID,
  NULL  AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID      ,     
  NULL  AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID         ,  
  WNCUR.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID          , 
  NULL  AS COGS_PERCENT                  ,
  NULL  AS COMMENTS                      ,
  NULL  AS CONTEXT                       ,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
  1 AS CREATED_BY,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATION_DATE,
  -9999  AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID      ,
  NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG ,
  NULL  AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT               ,
  'INV' AS EXTRACT_TYPE         ,   
  WNCR.FISCAL_ID, 
  'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG         , 
  WNCR.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      ,
  current_timestamp(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
  WNCR.GL_DT           AS       GL_DATE        ,
  WNCR.GL_POSTED_DT      AS       GL_POSTED_DATE,      
  NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME AS GLOBAL_NAME,
  NULL  AS GROUPING_ID   ,      
  NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,
  WNCR.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE  ,
  NULL  AS INVOICE_PERCENT               ,
  NULL  AS INVOICING_RULE_ID             ,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
  1 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG            ,
  NULL  AS LINE_PERCENT                ,
  CASE  WHEN SC_TV_ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN SC_TV_ERP.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT
        ELSE  SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT END  AS LINE_SEQ_ID,
  NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE       AS LINE_TYPE,  -- FOR IMMEDIATE IT IS NULL
  NULL  AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID      ,
  NULL  AS ORDER_HEADER_ID,
 -7777  AS ORDER_LINE_ID,    
 -9999  AS ORDER_NUMBER,
 WNCR.ORG_ID  AS ORG_ID,
 NULL  AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID      ,
 NULL  AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
 'Y'  AS QUOTA_FLAG , 
 NULL  AS REASON_CODE                   ,
 NULL  AS REBATE_AMOUNT                 ,
 NULL  AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID          ,
 CASE WHEN NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL  
   ELSE 999
 END AS REQUEST_ID,
 WNCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT AS RULE_START_DATE     ,      
 CASE WHEN SC_TV_ERP.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(ESCT_INIT_VAR2_ERP.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0)
      ELSE  COALESCE(ESCT_INIT_VAR2.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0)  END AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,
 CASE  WHEN SC_TV_ERP.SALES_REP_NUMBER IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(ESP_ERP.SALES_REP_ID,0)
       ELSE COALESCE(ESP_XAAS.SALES_REP_ID,0) END AS SALESREP_ID ,   
 NULL  AS  SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID     ,       
 NULL  AS  SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID     ,      
 NULL  AS  SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID     ,     
 WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE   ,
 CASE WHEN SC_TV_ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN SC_TV_ERP.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
      ELSE SC_TV_XAAS.SPLIT_PCT END AS SPLIT_PERCENT,        
 CASE WHEN  SC_TV_ERP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(EST_INIT_VAR2_ERP.TERRITORY_ID,  0)  
      ELSE COALESCE(EST_INIT_VAR2.TERRITORY_ID,  0) END AS TERRITORY_ID , 
 CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
    END AS TRANSACTION_DATE ,
 'O' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE     ,
  WNCR.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
  WNCR.TRX_DATE    AS TRX_DATE,
  NULL AS TRX_NAME,
  WNCR.TRX_NUMBER     AS TRX_NUMBER, 
  WNCR.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE      AS TRX_TYPE,
 NULL AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
 NULL AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
 'INV' AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
 WNCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
 CASE WHEN SC_TV_ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN SC_TV_ERP.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
      ELSE SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE END AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
  CASE WHEN SC_TV_ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN SC_TV_ERP.SALES_REP_NUMBER
       ELSE SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_REP_NUM END AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 CASE WHEN SC_TV_ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN SC_TV_ERP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
      ELSE SC_TV_XAAS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 CASE WHEN SC_TV_ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN SC_TV_ERP.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
      ELSE -999 END AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_EXP_CG WNCR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON WNCR.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_CG WNCUR
  ON WNCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=WNCUR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_ACRL_CG WSCF
  ON WNCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = WSCF.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX ACRL
  ON WSCF.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=ACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
   ON CAST(WNCR.GL_DT AS DATE) BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE and NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
   /* XAAS SALES CREDITING CHANGES*/
    LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_XAAS  SC_TV_XAAS 
     ON SC_TV_XAAS.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY =  ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
     AND SC_TV_XAAS.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE 
    --AND SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0
  /* AND (SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0 OR SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT<-1000000000)*/ /*Q3FY18 SC BIG_INT CHANGE */
  /* Q2FY19 Dec Rel : Added below join to refer ERP SC table for XAAS Non reference trx */  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN  
    ( SELECT SC_TV.* FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP SC_TV
       INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XAAS_TRX_FROM_ERP_SC EL 
     ON EL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SC_TV.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY
       WHERE SC_TV.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY > 0
        AND EL.NON_REF_TRX_FLAG = 'Y'    
    ) SC_TV_ERP 
    ON SC_TV_ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY =  ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR 
   ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
   AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNCR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME

SELECT

    ,CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='CM' THEN 'C'
          WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','DM') THEN 'I'
    WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='UNKNOWN' THEN
         CASE WHEN ACRL.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE='DEBIT' THEN 'C' ELSE 'I' END /*SINCE WE CONSIDER CONTRACT ASSETS RECORDS FOR INV*/
   END AS SOURCE_TYPE

 UNION ALL /*TO APPLY REGULAR SALES CREDITING FOR THE TRANSACTIONS WHOSE AR_TRX_LINE_KEY>0*/

   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_EXP_CG WNRTC
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX ACRL
    ON WNRTC.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = ACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
     ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  WHERE WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','DM','CM')
  AND ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','XAAS%','BSFT-ORDERS') 
  OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')) 
  OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ICMS-ADJ' AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL'))
  ) /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
  AND EXISTS
            ( 
              SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XAAS_TRX_FROM_ERP_SC EL, 
                   ( SELECT RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP WHERE RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY > 0 GROUP BY 1 ) ERP 
      WHERE EL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
      AND EL.NON_REF_TRX_FLAG = 'Y' 
      AND EL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY
            )                       
   AND ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY>0

    ON WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT

      AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE
      AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I' 
       )
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_ACRL_OM Y WHERE  WNRTC.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY  = Y.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY )

SELECT

    WNICE.GL_DT AS GL_DATE,
    NII.SALES_ACCOUNT_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY   AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
    FROM
    $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_EXP_CG WNICE
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
      ON WNICE.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII
    ON  NII.ITEM_KEY=WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY      -- USE SUB_SKU KEY INFO ONLY
    AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1     -- DERIVED USING ENGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    
    WHERE 
    --EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_EXP_CG WNICE WHERE ACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = WNICE.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY) AND 
    WNICE.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
    AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
 AND WNICE.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IN ('Immediate')

UNION ALL 

SELECT
    ACRL_INV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY,
    COALESCE(MIN(ACRL_REV.GL_DT),MIN(ACRL_INV.GL_DT)) AS GL_DATE,
    COALESCE(    MAX(CASE WHEN ACRL_REV.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE='DEBIT' 
                           THEN  ACRL_REV.RU_DBT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
                           ELSE ACRL_REV.RU_CDT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
                END ),MAX(NII.SALES_ACCOUNT_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY))  AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
    FROM
    $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_EXP_CG WNICE
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX ACRL_INV
    ON WNICE.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=ACRL_INV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC

    WHERE  DRVDR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
    AND DRVDR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY>0 
	AND DRVDR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY>0
    ) 
	AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB1
    WHERE DRVDB1.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    AND DRVDB1.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
    AND DRVDB1.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY>0
	AND DRVDB1.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY>0) */

SELECT 
  'REC' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS      ,
  COALESCE(WNCUR.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE, -999)  AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
  /*CASE WHEN WNGAR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  IS NOT NULL THEN SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID
  ELSE SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID
 END AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID */  -- USE IT INCASE OF CM TRANSACTIONS ENABLEMENT
  SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,    
 /*CASE WHEN WNGAR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  IS NOT NULL THEN WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME                    
  ELSE WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME      
 END AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,*/       
  WNCR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,  
  WNCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS ACCTD_AMOUNT ,
  'I' ACTION_CODE,
  NULL  AS ADJUSTMENT_ID      ,
  NULL  AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER ,
  NULL  AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE     ,
  WNCR.AMOUNT          ,
  1 AS BATCH_ID,
  NULL  AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID      ,     -- DERIVED BILL_TO INFO USING N_AR_TRX IN KEY PIPELINE OF MERGE ETL.
  NULL  AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID         ,  
  WNCUR.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID          , 
  NULL  AS COGS_PERCENT                  ,
  NULL  AS COMMENTS                      ,
  NULL  AS CONTEXT                       ,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
  1 AS CREATED_BY,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATION_DATE,
  -9999  AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID      , -- EVEN IN OA_S THEY ARE DEFAULTED
  -9999 AS  CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,                -- EVEN IN OA_S THEY ARE DEFAULTED
  -9999 AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,            -- EVEN IN OA_S THEY ARE DEFAULTED
  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG  AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG               ,
  NULL  AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT               ,
  'INV' AS EXTRACT_TYPE         ,   
   WNCR.FISCAL_ID AS FISCAL_ID, 
  'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG         , 
  WNCR.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE     ,
  current_timestamp(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
 WNCR.GL_DT           AS       GL_DATE        ,
 WNCR.GL_POSTED_DT      AS       GL_POSTED_DATE,      
 NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME AS GLOBAL_NAME,
 NULL  AS GROUPING_ID             ,      
 NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             ,
 WNCR.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE         ,
 NULL  AS INVOICE_PERCENT               ,
 NULL  AS INVOICING_RULE_ID             ,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 1 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG            ,
 NULL  AS LINE_PERCENT                  ,
 NULL  AS LINE_SEQ_ID                   ,
 NULL  AS LINE_TYPE                     ,
 NULL  AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID      ,
 NULL AS ORDER_HEADER_ID,                 -- REF FROM OA_S PIPELINE
 -7777 AS ORDER_LINE_ID,                  -- REF FROM OA_S PIPELINE
 -9999 AS ORDER_NUMBER,                   -- REF FROM OA_S PIPELINE
 WNCR.ORG_ID  AS ORG_ID, 
 NULL  AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID      ,
 NULL  AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
 'Y' AS QUOTA_FLAG                      ,  
 NULL  AS REASON_CODE                   ,
 0  AS REBATE_AMOUNT                 ,
 NULL  AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID          ,
 CASE WHEN NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL   -- FOR DEFAULT IT IS 'Y'
    ELSE 999   
  END AS REQUEST_ID,
 WNCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT AS RULE_START_DATE     ,      
 -999   AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,
 -999   AS SALESREP_ID,
 NULL  AS  SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID    ,       
 NULL  AS  SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID    ,      
 NULL  AS  SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID    ,     
 WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE                  ,   
 CAST (100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS SPLIT_PERCENT      ,  
 0 AS TERRITORY_ID,
 CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
   END AS TRANSACTION_DATE , 
 'O' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE     ,
 0 AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,   -- IN OA_S IT IS 0
 WNCR.TRX_DATE AS TRX_DATE,         
 NULL AS TRX_NAME,
 WNCR.TRX_NUMBER     AS TRX_NUMBER, 
 WNCR.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE      AS TRX_TYPE,
 NULL AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
 NULL AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
 'INV' AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
 WNCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
 'Direct Sales' AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE, -- IN OA_S IT IS 'UNKNOWN'
 'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_REP_NUM, 
 EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,    -- CAN DERIVE HERE OR IN FURTHER LAYERS
 -999 AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_EXP_CG WNCR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON WNCR.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_CG WNCUR
 ON WNCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=WNCUR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR 
  ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
  AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNCR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON WNCR.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON WNCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNCR.PRODUCT_KEY )
   
  /*INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
  ON CAST(WNCR.GL_DT AS DATE) BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE and NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE*/
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
  ON WNCR.FISCAL_ID = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
   
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_ACRL_CG WSCF
  ON WSCF.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY  = WNCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
  /*BELOW JOINS FOR DERIVATION OF SALES_TERRITORY_KEY*/
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX ACRL
  ON WNCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=ACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
  ON ACRL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
  ON (NSOL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)  /*WILL DERIVE BASED ON ONSITE INPUTS*/
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC 
  ON (NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=MSC.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD)
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP STMAP  
  ON STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME=NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2               
  ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=COALESCE(STMAP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,(SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP  WHERE SALES_COUNTRY_NAME='UNITED STATES'))
  AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
  WHERE   1=1 
  AND  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'Y'

SELECT
   WNRTC.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY ,
   WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
   CASE WHEN NART.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN NART.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
     ELSE 
        CASE WHEN EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <= 0 OR EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN 
           CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM','DM') THEN 0 WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN -9999 END
        ELSE EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID  END
  END      AS LINE_ID,
    CASE WHEN NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT IS NOT NULL THEN NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
    ELSE
     CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM','DM')  AND NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT < 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) END
    END AS ORDER_NUMBER
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_EXP_CG WNRTC
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON  WNRTC.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
   ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL
   ON EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   AND EORCTLOL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME  
   
   inner JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NART
   ON NART.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = WNRTC.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
   ON NSOL.sales_order_line_key = NART.sales_order_line_key
   AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
   ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_AR
   ON NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_AR.SALES_ORDER_KEY  where NART.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD ='Accruals_OM'

SELECT
   WNRTC.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
   ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
   ,'O'  SOURCE_TYPE
   , WNGL.LINE_ID
   ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_EXP_CG WNRTC
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_acrl_GET_LINES_OM WNGL
   ON WNRTC.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = WNGL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
   WHERE
   WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','CM','DM')
   AND
   (EXISTS 
   
   (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X
    WHERE X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'
    AND X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = WNGL.LINE_ID
    AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE)
   )
   UNION ALL
   SELECT
   WNRTC.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
   ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
   ,'O'  SOURCE_TYPE
   , WNGL.LINE_ID
   ,'Y' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_CUR_EXP_CG WNRTC
    INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACRL_GET_LINES_OM WNGL
   ON WNRTC.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = WNGL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
   WHERE
   WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','CM','DM')
   AND COALESCE(WNGL.LINE_ID,-1) > 0
   AND NOT EXISTS
    (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
    WHERE X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' 
    AND X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = WNGL.LINE_ID
    AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE)
